query:
SELECT 
  c.name AS cityName,
  CAST(pc.expenseCoverage AS CHAR) AS expenseCoverage_json,
  pc.profitRatioStage1Partner AS costShareRatio
FROM partner_cities pc
JOIN cities c ON pc.cityId = c.id
WHERE c.name IN ('武汉', '济南', '深圳', '宁波', '泉州')
ORDER BY c.name;
